consent.title: Before you begin
consent.subtitle: This service processes your personal and health-related data. Please read and accept the terms before continuing.

dataItems.account: Account data: username and display name
dataItems.profile: Profile picture (if you choose to upload one)
dataItems.health: Health metrics: weight, heart rate zones, power zones
dataItems.providers: Activity data from connected services (Strava, Wahoo) — if you choose to connect them
dataItems.ai: AI analysis of your workouts — if you choose to enable it

consent.checkboxLabel: I accept that this service stores and processes my personal and health-related data as described above.

decline.title: You declined the terms
decline.body: You cannot use the service without accepting the data processing terms. You can download a copy of your data, permanently delete your account, or simply log out.
decline.deleteConfirmBody: This will permanently delete your account and all associated data. Enter your password to confirm.

step1.title: Set up your profile
step1.subtitle: Tell us a bit about yourself. You can change all of this later in your profile settings.
step1.name: Display name

step2.title: Training zones
step2.subtitle: Set your heart rate and power zones. These are used for training load analysis.

step3.title: Connect services
step3.subtitle: Connect Strava or Wahoo to automatically import your workouts. This step is optional — you can connect them later in your profile.

step4.title: Automatic AI analysis
step4.subtitle: When enabled, new workouts will be automatically analysed by AI after upload. You can change this at any time in your profile.
step4.toggleDesc: Automatically analyse each new workout with AI.

step5.title: Set a goal
step5.subtitle: Goals help you stay focused on what you are training for. You can add more goals later.

step6.title: Create a training plan
step6.subtitle: Set up a structured training schedule. You can create or modify plans later.
step6.aiDescription: Describe your training goals and preferences
step6.aiDescriptionPlaceholder: e.g. I want to build aerobic base for a century ride in August. I can train 5 days a week, prefer morning rides.
